en.text: neuter of a presumed derivative of the original form of τλάω (to bear; equivalent to G5342); a balance (as supporting weights), i.e. (by implication) a certain weight (and thence a coin or rather sum of money) or "talent"

senses.gloss_en: neuter of a presumed derivative of the original form of τλάω (to bear; equivalent to G5342); a balance (as supporting weights), i.e. (by implication) a certain weight (and thence a coin or rather sum of money) or "talent"
